reasoning: Dinotefuran is a neonicotinoid insecticide containing a nitroguanidine pharmacophore; the core structure is a guanidine with N-methyl, N-nitro, and N-(tetrahydrofurylmethyl) substituents, placing it firmly in the guanidines class. The nitro group on the guanidine nitrogen is characteristic of nitroguanidine neonicotinoids.
